input.tenant_message: The showerhead in the main bathroom drips slowly after you turn it off. It's not a lot — maybe a drip every 10 seconds or so — but it's been going on since I moved in about 3 months ago. I just kept forgetting to mention it. Wanted to finally get it on the record in case it gets worse. The handles feel a little stiff too when you turn them.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a non-urgent repair to replace the shower valve cartridge — a post-shutoff drip combined with stiff handles is a clear indicator of a worn cartridge or O-ring inside the valve body, a standard inexpensive fix. Address within the next 2-3 weeks at the next available maintenance slot.
